commands.title: MigraPilot: Set Model Provider API Key
MigraPilot: Clear Model Provider API Key

migrapilot.brainUrl.description: Base URL for the MigraPilot brain service.

migrapilot.transcribeUrl.description: Local speech-to-text endpoint used by the chat mic. Audio recorded in the chat panel is relayed through the extension host to this URL (keeps voice private and on-device).

migrapilot.memoryMode.markdownDescription: Server-side conversation memory. `off` = stateless turns, nothing retained. `session` = the engine remembers the conversation while it runs (default). `durable` = the engine persists the conversation. History lives in the MigraAI Engine, scoped to this workspace — the extension only carries a conversation id.

migrapilot.autoStartBrain.description: In local-brain mode, attempt to auto-start the local brain service when it is unavailable (requires migrapilot.brainAutoStartCommand). Never affects pilot-api.

migrapilot.autoApplyChangeset.markdownDescription: Auto-approve build changes. When ON, a changeset the workspace engineer proposes is applied to your workspace immediately, with no Apply/Review prompt (an auto-accept / 'YOLO' mode, like Cursor's). When OFF (default), you review and click Apply first. Changes are still applied through the engine's approval boundary (atomic, rollback-on-failure) and a notification reports what was written. Only affects the LOCAL workspace engineer — never production.

migrapilot.brainAutoStartCommand.markdownDescription: argv used to launch the local brain-service when auto-starting (e.g. `["node", "/path/to/apps/brain-service/dist/src/server.js"]`). Empty disables spawning — the extension will still adopt an already-running brain but won't start one.

migrapilot.mode.markdownDescription: Backend mode. `local-brain` = local brain-service (default). `remote-pilot` = pilot-api (opt-in; requires a token and reachable service). `auto` = use pilot-api when ready+authorized, otherwise local. Legacy values map conservatively so remote stays opt-in: `offline`/`hybrid` → local-brain, `cloud` → remote-pilot.

migrapilot.pilotApiUrl.description: Base URL for the MigraPilot pilot-api service (used in remote-pilot / auto modes).

migrapilot.pilotApiAuthMode.description: Authentication for pilot-api. 'bearer' sends the token from SecretStorage (set via 'MigraPilot: Set Pilot Service Token'). 'none' is for a local dev pilot-api with auth disabled.

migrapilot.pilotApiToken.markdownDescription: **Discouraged.** Non-secret fallback token, used ONLY when SecretStorage is empty (headless/dev). Prefer the 'MigraPilot: Set Pilot Service Token' command, which stores the token in SecretStorage and never writes it to settings.

migrapilot.requestTimeoutMs.description: Per-request timeout (ms) for pilot-api and model-provider calls.

migrapilot.provider.markdownDescription: Model provider for local chat. `stub` = deterministic built-in response (default; for local/deterministic use). `openai-compat` = a real OpenAI-compatible `/chat/completions` endpoint (OpenAI, Ollama `/v1`, LM Studio, vLLM, …). There is no silent fallback: a configured real provider that fails surfaces an error.

migrapilot.providerUrl.description: Base URL for the openai-compat provider (must expose POST /chat/completions).

migrapilot.providerModel.description: Model name sent to the openai-compat provider.

migrapilot.providerApiKey.markdownDescription: **Discouraged.** Non-secret fallback API key, used ONLY when SecretStorage is empty (headless/dev). Prefer the 'MigraPilot: Set Model Provider API Key' command, which stores the key in SecretStorage and never writes it to settings.

migrapilot.maxContextChunks.description: Maximum retrieved chunks to include in context.

migrapilot.enableTelemetry.description: Enable local telemetry for MigraPilot requests.
